name: Deel
description: Step up your performance management with Deel HR, a flexible system to build high-performing teams. Learn more about Deel

reviews.review_title: Great app / great value
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Fast and simple, as employee i can manage really easy and straight foward my contracts, i didnt have to face with issues at the moment of upload the documentation for the contract and redemption or balance so im very happy with the service, my money has value
reviews.review_cons: nothing at the moment, im very happy with the service provided by the application, maybe i would add other language options

reviews.review_title: Deel is a good deal
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: When I started using Deel, the first thing that really stood out was its incredible adaptability to my schedule. It saved me a lot of time thanks to its various automations, allowing me to better manage my multiple files and contracts. And when I had problems, its customer service was a great help.
reviews.review_cons: Bugs, more bugs, that's the main problem I encounter daily, and it really bothers me because it often slows down my concentration

reviews.review_title: Not innovative app
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Providing various withdrawal options from overseas transfer to Deel Card. I really love to use Deel card using Apple wallet.
reviews.review_cons: Mobile app is too slow to use. Whenever navigating from a screen to another, I feel there are performance issues. I’ve already pointed it out during a call with a CS agent, but seems nobody has worked on mobile app properly. Plus, authentication is too complicated.

reviews.review_title: I wish I knew about Deel sooner!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Take it from a person who has used a lot of different platforms to manage money— Deel is the fastest, simplest, most engaging platform out there to do transactions and receive payment!
reviews.review_pros: I genuinely feel that Deel is a platform made with the user in mind. The contract made to use this platform feels solid and honest. The the fees charged per transaction are both reasonable and competitive when you compare it to other platforms. I get my money in my bank in less than a day which is incredibly convenient. And of course they are quick to work on any issues that may happen, and you will always get updated responses and notifications to ensure your money and transactions were done by you and only you.
reviews.review_cons: To be honest, it's a little confusing to find the place where you can talk to an actual person to fix issues instead of getting automated responses from the machine. But really, it's there. It's just a matter of searching a bit deeper.

reviews.review_title: Clean UX and Rock-Solid Reliability: A Developer’s Choice
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: My experience with Deel has been exceptional. It removes the administrative "noise" of international contracting, allowing me to focus entirely on building and maintaining the webflow sites for my clients. The platform’s advanced compliance capabilities provide peace of mind, knowing that all tax forms and local labor laws are handled automatically.
reviews.review_pros: I like the speed of the payment infrastructure. As a Webflow Developer, I really appreciate a clean, well-designed UX and Deel delivers exactly that. As a freelancer, contract signing with the company was made easy with Deel. Along with that it helps me in invoicing, tracking and submitting work hours for approval to my clients efficiently.
reviews.review_cons: The only minor drawback is the withdrawal fees associated with certain local bank transfers in specific regions, which can feel a bit high compared to standard wire transfers. Additionally, while the web platform is world-class, the mobile app experience could be more robust to match the advanced features available on the desktop version.

reviews.review_title: Terrible Service and Deel's Gross Negligence
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years
reviews.review_description: My experience with Deel has been absolutely terrible. From the start, they provided awful service: they consistently failed to meet committed deadlines, had terrible communication, and frequently cancelled meetings at the last minute. This pattern of unprofessionalism and negligence culminated in a disaster with my O-1A visa petition, which was denied on November 24, 2025. The denial was not due to my qualifications, but due to amateur administrative errors by Deel's team. The USCIS denial letter explicitly stated that Deel **forgot to attach critical evidence** to the application. The officer wrote: *"You did not submit that letter with your RFE response"* regarding key testimonial and salary documents that were vital for my case. Furthermore, they contradicted themselves regarding the employer structure, leading to an automatic rejection. I strongly warn other founders against trusting Deel with sensitive immigration processes. Their negligence and lack of respect for deadlines have caused significant damage to my company's expansion plans.
reviews.review_pros: Deel excels at Multi Country Payroll, simplifying global payments for distributed teams efficiently.
reviews.review_cons: Awful service: they consistently failed to meet committed deadlines, had terrible communication, and frequently cancelled meetings at the last minute.

reviews.review_title: INCREDIBLE WORK
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: I really like using it; it's easy and intuitive. Very easy to use, it allows me to know my employment contract day by day.
reviews.review_pros: Freedom to exchange money in various currencies and it allows me to receive my payroll safely and securely every single day
reviews.review_cons: Nothing, everything seems great to me. The exchange rates are simply annoying sometimes because they take away like 4 dollars from me, and that's quite a lot of money.

reviews.review_title: Good app for remote contracting
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, it has been a positive experience. Deel provides a reliable and efficient solution for remote work, and I would recommend it to professionals and companies managing international teams.
reviews.review_pros: It is easy to use, intuitive, and well designed. The platform makes international payments simple and efficient, and the overall user experience feels smooth and reliable.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes the app feels a bit slow, especially when loading certain sections. Improving performance speed and responsiveness would enhance the overall user experience.

reviews.review_title: Simple and Reliable Global Payroll Solution
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My experience with Deel has been good. It makes handling international payments and contracts simple, and it saves a lot of time when working with people in different countries.
reviews.review_pros: What I like most about Deel is how easy it makes it to pay and manage people in different countries.
reviews.review_cons: It can get a bit expensive, especially for small businesses, and sometimes the features feel more suited for larger companies than individuals or very small teams.

reviews.review_title: Reliable, Automated, and Fully Compliant Platform
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: Really enjoyable, simple and automatic. The key point is that I operate in full compliance, under a contractual framework and applicable laws.
reviews.review_pros: I really appreciate the standard and customizable contracts, smooth task submission, automatic invoicing, and the strong support with tax compliance, which makes everything simple and reliable.
reviews.review_cons: Finding submitted tasks quickly and easily could be improved, as it’s sometimes not very intuitive to locate and review all tasks completed over a given period.

reviews.review_title: Deel Platform Review
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: So far everything has been smooth especially the pay-outs. It has been the best platform we've used so far and I hope we maintain this platform.
reviews.review_pros: It's very easy to use - time ins, time outs, scheduling paid time offs, checking calendar schedules and and monitoring. One thing i like about is getting payouts ~ it is relatively fast and convenient. Setting up is also very easy. Issues and bugs have also been easily resolved. Customer support has been spot on as well. To include to that, it is very affordable compared to other HR platforms as well. Contracts are well defined and notifications on any changes have been applied. I'm glad we are using Deel as our HR platform.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing in particular, I just think that the set up hasn't been done properly yet due to the schedule of our boss' secretary since she forsees deel. The PTO set up of our company hasn't been properly fixed up until now.

reviews.review_title: Great platform for payroll processing, workflow automations and compliance insurance
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years
reviews.review_description: Overall, Deel is a great platform because it centralizes loads of information in one pleace, allowing users to stay on top of compliance issues and regulations, while streamlining processes through workflows and great UX
reviews.review_pros: Deel is the ideal tool for payments in different parts of the world, and most importantly, for companies that are 100% remote. We can easily pay our Consultants and Contractors around the world. The UX is very solid, and whenever I have a suggestion, I can send it over to the Design team and I know they will take it into account and it will be helpful for them in terms of improvements and provide better platform support. I also love that I'm completing the Deel certifications and learning more about this world!
reviews.review_cons: Unfortunately, sometimes, there are a few features or things I may not understand and it would be great to have an 'assitance' button like "?". I wish the integration with Charthop could be more complete, because although it is 'easy' and it implements just fine, it doesnt add much value or sync enough meaningful data.

reviews.review_title: perfect app for payroll and contract services
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: The app provides a seamless experience — tasks flow naturally from one step to the next without confusion or delays. Features are integrated in a way that makes completing processes, such as contract management and payments, smooth and uninterrupted.
reviews.review_pros: The platform is intuitive and user-friendly. The interface is clean and well-organized, which makes navigation straightforward even for first-time users. Key functions such as viewing contracts, submitting invoices, and tracking payments are easy to locate and complete without unnecessary steps. The app also minimizes complexity by offering clear instructions, dropdowns, and automated prompts where needed, reducing the chance of error. Additionally, the mobile and desktop versions are consistent, allowing a smooth experience across devices. Overall, the design feels efficient and saves time by making routine tasks simple and accessible.
reviews.review_cons: At this point, I don’t have any dislikes about Deel. The experience has been smooth and efficient with no significant issues to mention.

reviews.review_title: Simple and Reliable Platform for Global Work
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with Deel has been very positive. It is a reliable and efficient platform that makes managing contracts and payments much easier. It has been a useful tool for working with international companies and staying compliant without unnecessary complications.
reviews.review_pros: Deel is very easy to use and has a clean, intuitive interface. It simplifies international payments and contract management, making the whole process smooth and stress-free. I especially like how everything is centralized in one platform, which saves time and reduces confusion.
reviews.review_cons: Some features could be explained a bit better for new users, and certain processes may take a little time to fully understand at first. However, once you get familiar with the platform, everything works well.

reviews.review_title: Streamlined Contract Management, Minor Glitches
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: As a contractor, my overall experience with Deel has been positive. The platform makes it easy to manage contracts and payments across borders, which removes a lot of stress around compliance and paperwork. I appreciate the intuitive interface and the ability to handle everything in one place—from signing agreements to tracking invoices. The chat support is responsive and helpful, though at times the answers feel a bit scripted. I did encounter occasional minor glitches, like delays in dashboard updates, but these were quickly resolved. While the pricing feels high for individual contractors, the peace of mind that comes with reliable compliance and smooth payment processing makes it worthwhile.
reviews.review_pros: What I liked most about Deel is how it simplifies the complexity of hiring and managing international employees. The platform makes global compliance and contract management feel effortless, with ready-to-use templates that respect local laws. I especially appreciate the intuitive interface—it’s easy to onboard new hires, manage payroll, and keep everything centralized without needing multiple tools. The integrated chat support also adds real value, as it provides quick guidance whenever questions arise, making the whole experience smoother and more reliable.
reviews.review_cons: As a contractor, what I liked least about Deel is that the pricing feels high compared to the simplicity of my needs. While the platform is designed for complex global compliance, some features—like advanced reporting or employee management—are more relevant to larger companies than to individual contractors. I also experienced occasional minor glitches, such as delays in dashboard updates or automated notifications, which can be frustrating when tracking payments. Finally, although chat support is responsive, the answers sometimes feel scripted rather than personalized, which makes communication less engaging.

reviews.review_title: Deel IT Makes Contract Work Effortless – Invoices, Payments, and Funds in One Place
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: Ease of recieving theOperational simplicity in contract management: Deel removes the complexity of managing contractor payments by centralizing invoices, payments, and fund transfers in one place. Zero administrative overhead: Since invoices are often created and payments are initiated by the contractor, Deel eliminates manual follow-ups and operational headaches on my end. Effortless payment tracking: I only need to log in once a month to track payments, highlighting how frictionless and intuitive the platform is. Financial flexibility (Advance Payments): Deel’s advance payment feature provides a safety net by offering up to 50% of contract value upfront, easing short-term financial pressure when needed. Seamless banking integration: Easy integration with JP Morgan Infinity enables fast and smooth transfers with minimal setup, reducing dependency on manual banking workflows. Reliability that minimizes support dependency: The platform works so smoothly that customer support hasn’t been needed—indicating stability and well-designed processes.
reviews.review_pros: What I like best about Deel IT is how simple it makes managing my contract work with organisation. I can easily track invoices, monitor payments, and seamlessly transfer or deploy funds – all from one place. It removes a lot of the operational friction and lets me focus on the actual work. In many cases, my contractor themselves creates the invoices and transfer the payment. Headache for me = Zero I use it honestly just once a month during to track my payment, that how easy it has made my life. Additionally, though I have not used the feature - Deel advance payment is a good way to ease out if you have a financial burden. It tracks your payment basis the contract and offers 50% of it at any given point in time. I use JP Morgan's Infinity - it was ultra easy to integrate with it? I just had to enter a few details. The smooth integration and implementation gave me a fast transfer option. Fortunately, I did not have to use their customer support yet. So that is a great pointer for them. Overall it is reliable, has advanced capabilities and help me up my efficiency by allowing me to focus on my core work.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing that is specific, its just there are so many features that I sometimes tend to feel lost just to figure things out. Also that my country does not have Deel card is sad :(

reviews.review_title: A Reliable Platform for International Contract Work
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Deel has been one of the most efficient tools I’ve used for collaborating with international clients. It saves time, avoids confusion with contract terms, and makes remote work administration much easier. I feel secure and confident when using Deel.
reviews.review_pros: I really like how Deel simplifies international contract management, especially for independent contractors. The platform is user-friendly, documents are well organized, and payments are processed quickly and transparently. It provides a very professional experience.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes, customer support responses can be slightly delayed, especially on weekends or public holidays. I also wish there were more withdrawal options available in certain regions.

reviews.review_title: The best DEEL.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with Deel has been excellent. It’s easy to use, incredibly efficient, and removes the usual stress of managing global work. Everything—from onboarding to payroll and compliance—feels smooth, reliable, and hassle-free. Deel makes complex processes simple, and that’s what truly sets it apart.
reviews.review_pros: What I like most about Deel is how it transforms global work into something simple and seamless. It takes away the stress of compliance, payroll, and endless paperwork, and replaces it with peace of mind and efficiency. Deel gives businesses the freedom to hire anyone, anywhere—without the usual barriers. In short, it turns something overwhelming into something empowering, making global work feel effortless and limitless.
reviews.review_cons: What I liked least about Deel is that some features can feel a bit complex at first, especially if you’re new to global compliance or payroll tools. There’s a small learning curve, but once you get used to it, the platform becomes much easier to navigate.

reviews.review_title: Can Get Paid Too 4 work
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with Deel has been excellent. The platform is reliable, intuitive, and built to simplify processes that are usually time-consuming and complex. From onboarding to payroll and compliance, everything flows smoothly and efficiently. Their support team is consistently responsive and helpful, which makes the entire experience even better. Deel has become a tool I can trust daily, and it has significantly improved productivity and peace of mind in managing global operations.
reviews.review_pros: I really appreciate how seamless and intuitive the platform is. Deel makes managing contracts, payments, and compliance incredibly easy, even for complex international processes. The interface is clean, fast, and user-friendly, and everything feels well-organized. Their customer support is also outstanding—quick, knowledgeable, and always willing to go the extra mile. Overall, Deel saves a lot of time and removes the stress from administrative tasks.
reviews.review_cons: While the platform is overall very efficient, some advanced features can feel a bit limited or require extra steps to fully customize. Additionally, occasional delays in syncing certain updates can slow down the workflow. However, these are minor inconveniences compared to the platform’s overall value and reliability

reviews.review_title: Deel the best app
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: I had all my salary going to my Deel account, so far everything is going well.My overall experience with Deel has been very positive, primarily because it reduces the 'admin tax' of global hiring. In my experience, what usually takes weeks—like vetting a local contract in Germany or setting up payroll in Brazil—is condensed into a few clicks. I particularly value the automated compliance guardrails; the platform proactively flags missing documents, which prevents legal headaches before they start. While the sheer volume of features can sometimes lead to a slightly cluttered UI, the time saved on manual cross-border coordination makes it a net win for the team."
reviews.review_pros: Customer service, Fast money sending and Deel Advance. What I "like" most is their ability to make the world feel smaller. They’ve effectively removed the borders for talent, allowing a company in San Francisco to hire someone in Nairobi as easily as if they lived next door.
reviews.review_cons: None, everything is going well so far. Because Deel scales so quickly, their customer support can sometimes feel the pressure. When you're dealing with complex, country-specific legal questions, the first-tier support chat might take a minute to get you to the right specialist. It’s clear they’re investing heavily here now, but keeping that 'white-glove' service consistent across 150 countries is a massive, ongoing challenge.

reviews.review_title: Reliable platform that saves time and headaches
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, Deel has been a great tool for getting paid as a freelancer. It keeps contracts and payments organized, and it’s reassuring to have a clear status for each step instead of guessing. Once everything is set up, it basically runs on autopilot. For international work especially, it’s a very reliable and efficient platform.
reviews.review_pros: I use Deel as a contractor, and my client (Genius Sports) pays me through it. The best part is how smooth and predictable the whole process is: contracts are easy to review and sign, and payments arrive reliably. Everything is clearly tracked in one place, so I don’t have to chase emails or wonder what’s happening with a payout. Overall it feels stable and professional, and it saves time and stress.
reviews.review_cons: Minor things: sometimes the interface feels a bit “too corporate” and not everything is intuitive at first — you need a couple of clicks to find the exact section you want. Also, depending on the payout method, fees can be noticeable. Nothing deal-breaking, just areas where the experience could be a bit simpler and more transparent.ments, and support response time varies depending on the request. Nothing critical, but there’s room to make navigation a bit more intuitive.

reviews.review_title: Awesome Deel Experience
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Positive experience so far. Deel offers an overwhelmingly positive overall experience, praised by businesses for simplifying global hiring, payroll, and compliance through a user-friendly, automated platform.
reviews.review_pros: Quick disbursal, automatic invoice generation. It provides a centralized system for contracts, invoices, and payments, offering diverse payment options and automating complex global payroll to ensure compliance with various local laws.
reviews.review_cons: High costs and complex pricing, slow customer support and platform performance issues, limited customization in certain workflows, and the potential need for third-party integrations for advanced features

reviews.review_title: A Reliable and User-Friendly Payment Platform
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with Deel has been very positive. The platform is easy to use, transparent, and reliable. I really like that they clearly communicate payment cycles and exact payout dates, which makes planning much easier. Deel also feels very secure, as they require identity verification and confirmation every time you log in, so you know your account is well protected. My favorite feature is the option to decide what percentage of my money stays in the app and what goes to my card, which works as a great savings tool.
reviews.review_pros: What I like most about Deel is that it is very easy to use and transparent. They clearly show the exact dates to close each payment cycle and the exact date when you will receive your payment, which gives a lot of peace of mind. The platform feels secure and also allows you to decide what percentage of your money stays in the app and what goes directly to your card, which works as a savings tool. Unlike other platforms, Deel does not deduct hidden fees or taxes, so your money truly remains yours.
reviews.review_cons: Honestly, I don’t have any major complaints about Deel. At the beginning, it can feel a little difficult to understand because the platform has many features, especially if you are new. However, Deel provides clear guidance and support from the start, which helps you learn quickly. So far, I haven’t found anything I truly dislike about the application.

reviews.review_title: Topnotch experience
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Honestly, my overall experience with Deel has been overwhelmingly positive, so far so good, not gonna lie! Despite the one drawback of the high transfer fees, the platform delivers excellent value where it matters most: reliability and support. The peace of mind knowing that my contracts and payments are managed in such an organized and secure way is worth a lot. It has made managing my international client work seamless and efficient, and I look forward to continuing to use the service for my future contracts.
reviews.review_pros: The customer support I've received from Deel has been truly topnotch. Whenever I've had a question about an invoice or a new feature, their team has been highly responsive, often replying within minutes through the chat. They solved my issue with my first payment quickly and professionally. Furthermore, the platform's overall ease of use is fantastic. The interface is intuitive and well-designed, which made the onboarding process incredibly simple. I can quickly generate contracts, manage my documents, and track my payments without having to search through complex menus.
reviews.review_cons: The primary issue I've encountered is related to the fees associated with receiving my payments. While the service itself is reliable, the transfer fees and processing charges for certain withdrawal methods, such as bank transfers, feel significantly high compared to other platforms I've used. This unfortunately reduces the overall amount of my payout more than I would prefer and forces me to carefully choose my withdrawal method to minimize the financial impact. I truly hope Deel considers offering more competitive or transparent fee structures in the future for global contractors.

reviews.review_title: Reliable and Easy Global Payment Solution
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with Deel has been very positive. The platform makes it simple to manage contracts, payroll, and international payments in one place. It is easy to use, reliable, and provides good value for money. Customer support is responsive, and despite some withdrawal fees and limited payout options in certain countries, Deel has greatly simplified the way I handle payments and remote work management.
reviews.review_pros: I really like how easy and user friendly Deel is. It offers multiple payout options, quick transfers, and the flexibility to receive payments in different currencies, which makes managing international payments much smoother
reviews.review_cons: The main downside is that withdrawal fees, especially with SWIFT, can be a bit high, and some payout options are not available in all countries. Additionally, while Deel has many powerful features, it can take some time to get fully familiar with the more advanced functions.
